ship.name: R.M.S. Regina
ship.tagline: Not a Cruise. A Floating Empire.

zones.name: Adventure Zone
zones.description: Heart-pounding thrills across 15 decks of pure adrenaline

locations.name: Thunder Wave Coaster
locations.subtitle: Ocean-Spanning Mega Coaster
locations.description: The world's first coaster that spans the entire width of a mega-ship, with ocean-level drops and 360-degree barrel rolls over open water.
interactions: Ride the coaster with up to 40 players simultaneously
Choose front/back row for different camera experiences
Unlock secret night-ride mode with bioluminescent track
Photo mode at peak drops with ocean backdrop
Compete for fastest time leaderboard
locations.questLine: Thunder Rider — Complete all 7 inversions without closing your eyes (VR mode)

locations.name: Aqua Abyss Water Park
locations.subtitle: 47 Slides, 12 Pools, Zero Gravity
locations.description: A 15-deck vertical water park featuring Neptune's Fury — a transparent tube slide that wraps around the ship's exterior, plunging riders through open air above the ocean.
interactions: Race friends on 6-lane mega slides
Discover hidden grotto with underwater treasure
Ride Neptune's Fury — transparent exterior slide
Surf the wave machine with physics-based gameplay
Unlock zero-gravity water orb in secret pool
locations.questLine: Aqua Master — Ride all 47 slides in under 3 hours

locations.name: Deep Blue Observatory
locations.subtitle: 3km Underwater Aquarium Tunnel
locations.description: Descend below the waterline into a 3km curved acrylic tunnel surrounded by 10,247 marine species — from bioluminescent jellyfish to whale sharks passing overhead.
interactions: Hand-feed dolphins at interaction stations
Photograph rare species for marine biologist questline
Discover the ghost ship visible through deep observation port
Scuba diving mini-game in controlled area
Activate bioluminescent light show at midnight
locations.questLine: Marine Photographer — Catalog all 10,247 species

locations.name: Kids Adventure Kingdom
locations.subtitle: 5-Acre Indoor Theme Park
locations.description: A pirate-ship climbing structure, neon VR gaming pods, ocean-themed mini-golf, and a go-kart arcade spanning 3 full decks.
interactions: Battle pirate NPCs on the climbing ship
Enter VR dungeons exclusive to this zone
Race go-karts through ship-themed tracks
Play 18-hole glow-in-the-dark mini golf
Win plush prizes at carnival games
locations.questLine: Kingdom Champion — Win all 30 mini-games

locations.name: Sky Court Arena
locations.subtitle: Basketball Over The Ocean
locations.description: A regulation basketball court with transparent glass flooring suspended over the ocean. Watch dolphins leap below as you dunk.
interactions: Play 5v5 multiplayer basketball
Challenge NPC legends for rewards
Watch dolphins through glass floor during play
Host tournaments with guild members
Halftime show with holographic performers
locations.questLine: MVP Challenge — Score 50 points in a single game

zones.name: World-Class Dining
zones.description: 50+ restaurants from Michelin-starred to midnight street food

locations.name: The Infinite Feast
locations.subtitle: World's Largest Floating Buffet
locations.description: 2,000+ dishes from every cuisine on Earth, ice sculpture galleries, live cooking stations, and a chocolate fountain the size of a car.
interactions: Cook at live stations with chef NPCs
Create your own dish in the fusion kitchen
Photograph the giant mermaid ice sculpture
Discover the secret menu by talking to head chef
Food critic questline — rate every restaurant
locations.questLine: World Eater — Try a dish from every country

locations.name: Sakura Omakase
locations.subtitle: 17-Course, 3-Michelin-Star Experience
locations.description: A 12-seat hinoki-wood counter where master Chef Tanaka prepares the world's finest omakase against a panoramic sunset backdrop.
interactions: Watch Chef Tanaka prepare each course in real-time
Learn sushi-making in exclusive mini-game
Choose seasonal ingredients from the walk-in
Unlock secret 18th course by befriending the chef
Cherry blossom petal animation during dessert
locations.questLine: Omakase Apprentice — Master all 17 courses

locations.name: Sunset Terrace
locations.subtitle: Private Sky Dining Pods
locations.description: Glass-enclosed private dining pods cantilevered over the ocean, each with its own sunset view. The most romantic dinner spot on Earth.
interactions: Reserve a private pod with in-game currency
Trigger proposal animation with ring item
Order from 6 cuisine menus per pod
Watch dynamic sunset cycle in real-time
Fireworks show from pod after special events
locations.questLine: Romantic Voyage — Dine at sunset in every pod

locations.name: Le Horizon
locations.subtitle: 5-Star French Fine Dining
locations.description: Opulent French restaurant with floor-to-ceiling ocean views, 50,000-bottle wine cellar, crystal chandeliers, and mahogany paneling.
interactions: Wine tasting mini-game with sommelier NPC
Request the chef's secret off-menu dish
Tour the 50,000-bottle wine cellar
Live piano performance request system
Formal dress-up required — wardrobe mini-game
locations.questLine: Connoisseur — Taste wines from every region

locations.name: Grand Galley Kitchen
locations.subtitle: 500 Chefs, 100,000 Meals Daily
locations.description: The beating heart of Regina's food empire — a massive stainless-steel kitchen where 500 chefs produce 100,000 meals daily.
interactions: Join a cooking class with the head chef
Navigate the kitchen obstacle course
Operate the industrial chocolate fountain
Discover secret recipes in NPC journals
Time-attack: prepare a 3-course meal
locations.questLine: Kitchen Master — Cook 1,000 meals

zones.name: Entertainment District
zones.description: Casino, theater, and the hottest nightclub on the seven seas

locations.name: Fortune's Palace Casino
locations.subtitle: 3,000 Slots, 200 Tables, Infinite Luck
locations.description: A three-deck opulent casino with 3,000 slot machines, VIP poker rooms, roulette, and the legendary Dragon's Jackpot worth 10M gold.
interactions: Play poker, blackjack, roulette with in-game currency
Challenge the Casino Boss NPC for mega jackpot
Access VIP high-roller room with reputation
Trigger heist questline from bartender NPC
Win exclusive cosmetics from slot machines
locations.questLine: High Roller — Win 1M gold in a single night

locations.name: Celestial Theater
locations.subtitle: 5,000-Seat Holographic Broadway
locations.description: A 5,000-seat theater spanning 5 decks, featuring holographic Broadway shows, zero-gravity acrobatics, and real-time audience participation.
interactions: Watch full Broadway-length shows with cutscenes
Audition as a performer in talent show event
Vote on story outcomes during interactive shows
Backstage tour with secret lore collectibles
Conduct the orchestra in rhythm mini-game
locations.questLine: Standing Ovation — Attend all 12 shows

locations.name: Nebula Sky Club
locations.subtitle: The Highest Nightclub on Earth
locations.description: An open-air rooftop nightclub at the ship's highest point — holographic DJ, laser sky-show, infinity-pool dance floor, and robot bartenders.
interactions: Dance with physics-based animation system
Request songs from holographic DJ
Swim-dance in the infinity pool dance floor
Order custom cocktails from robot bartenders
VIP skybox with private fireworks button
locations.questLine: Party Legend — Dance for 24 hours straight
locations.unlockable: Neon Glow Outfit + DJ Emote Pack

zones.name: Pools & Relaxation
zones.description: 23 pools, a full beach, and the world's best floating spa

locations.name: Azure Paradise
locations.subtitle: 23 Interconnected Paradise Pools
locations.description: 23 pools connected by waterfalls, lazy rivers, rope bridges, and underwater tunnels. The crown jewel: a 50m infinity pool overlooking the stern.
interactions: Float the entire lazy river circuit
Dive from the 10m high-dive platform
Find hidden pool accessible only by underwater tunnel
Pool party event with 200 NPCs
Flamingo float racing mini-game
locations.questLine: Pool Champion — Swim in all 23 pools

locations.name: Endless Summer Beach
locations.subtitle: Climate-Controlled Indoor Ocean Beach
locations.description: A glass-domed artificial beach with real sand, wave machine, palm trees, tiki bars, and a permanent 28°C tropical climate.
interactions: Build sandcastles with physics sandbox
Surf the wave machine with skill-based gameplay
Play beach volleyball tournament
Order drinks from tiki bar NPCs
Watch artificial sunrise/sunset cycle
locations.questLine: Beach Bum — Spend 48 hours on the beach

locations.name: Serenity Spa
locations.subtitle: 100+ Treatments, Infinite Peace
locations.description: Natural hot-spring pools, bamboo gardens, meditation pavilions, and 100+ wellness treatments with panoramic ocean views.
interactions: Receive spa treatments for stat buffs
Meditate for XP multiplier bonus
Soak in hot springs to restore HP
Learn yoga poses from NPC instructor
Unlock zen garden customization for player home
locations.questLine: Inner Peace — Complete all 100 treatments
locations.unlockable: Zen Master Title + Meditation Aura Effect

zones.name: Sports & Recreation
zones.description: Championship golf, basketball, and more — all at sea

locations.name: Ocean Links Golf Course
locations.subtitle: 18-Hole Championship Over Open Water
locations.description: A full 18-hole championship golf course spanning 6 decks, with fairways crossing between levels and ocean-hazard holes.
interactions: Play full 18-hole rounds with friends
Wind physics affected by real-time weather
Hit balls into the ocean for distance challenges
Tournament events with leaderboard prizes
Caddy NPC with tips and lore dialogue
locations.questLine: Hole in One — Ace every par-3 hole
locations.unlockable: Golden Driver Club + Golf Cart Vehicle

locations.name: Sunset Putting Green
locations.subtitle: Bioluminescent Night Golf
locations.description: A 9-hole bioluminescent putting course that transforms at dusk — neon-lit holes, holographic scoreboards, and ocean panoramas.
interactions: Putt on bioluminescent greens at night
Compete in glow-golf tournaments
Customize ball trail colors
Discover hidden 10th hole Easter egg
Bet on mini-golf with other players
locations.questLine: Night Putter — Perfect score on all 9 holes

zones.name: Nature & Wildlife
zones.description: A rainforest and African savanna — inside a ship

locations.name: Eden Biodome
locations.subtitle: 5-Deck Tropical Rainforest
locations.description: A 5-deck glass dome enclosing a full tropical rainforest with waterfalls, exotic birds, butterflies, monkeys, and a canopy walkway.
interactions: Walk the canopy bridges between trees
Photograph rare species for reward system
Discover hidden waterfall cave with treasure
Feed parrots and butterflies at interaction points
Witness scheduled rainfall event with rainbow
locations.questLine: Naturalist — Photograph every species in the dome

locations.name: Serengeti at Sea
locations.subtitle: African Safari on a Ship
locations.description: A glass-roofed savanna housing 200+ animals — elephants, giraffes, zebras, lions — with guided jeep tours.
interactions: Ride safari jeep through the savanna
Photograph lions at the watering hole
Pet baby elephants at the nursery
Night safari with spotlight gameplay
Veterinarian mini-game caring for animals
locations.questLine: Safari King — Complete all 23 species encounters

zones.name: Ship Operations
zones.description: The infrastructure that keeps a floating city alive

locations.name: Grand Arrival Hall
locations.subtitle: Immigration & Customs — 47 Languages
locations.description: A three-story marble customs hall inspired by Grand Central Station, where 8,000 guests pass through daily. Get your REGINA passport stamped.
interactions: Get your REGINA passport stamped
Choose your cabin assignment at kiosk
Talk to immigration NPCs in 47 languages
Discover VIP fast-track by finding hidden pass
Photo booth with 'Welcome Aboard' backdrop
locations.questLine: World Traveler — Visit all 47 language counters

locations.name: Regina Medical Center
locations.subtitle: 500-Bed Futuristic Hospital
locations.description: A state-of-the-art hospital with robotic surgery, holographic diagnostics, MRI scanners, and a helipad for emergency evacuations.
interactions: Operate the robotic surgery arm mini-game
Scan patients with holographic diagnostic tool
Emergency helicopter rescue quest
Visit the pharmacy for healing items
Train as a field medic for team healing ability
locations.questLine: Chief Surgeon — Complete 100 successful surgeries
locations.unlockable: Medic Class Upgrade + Healing Aura Skill

locations.name: Heart of the Ship
locations.subtitle: 120 MW Nuclear Fusion Core
locations.description: The massive engine room housing a nuclear fusion reactor, 6 thrusters, and the control room that keeps Regina moving at 28 knots.
interactions: Control the ship's heading in navigation mini-game
Monitor reactor levels in crisis event
Repair thrusters in engineering puzzle
Pull the main throttle lever to full speed
Secret passage to Captain's quarters from engine
locations.questLine: Chief Engineer — Keep the reactor stable for 7 days
locations.unlockable: Engineer's Wrench Weapon + Engine Room Key

locations.name: Regina Transit System
locations.subtitle: 47-Station Ship-Wide Monorail
locations.description: A magnetic monorail system connecting all 47 decks and every zone, with glass-walled carriages for scenic travel across the ship.
interactions: Ride the monorail for fast travel between zones
Unlock scenic route showing all ship highlights
Find hidden station that leads to secret area
Drive the monorail in conductor mini-game
Use transit map to plan exploration routes
locations.questLine: All Stations — Visit every station on the line
locations.unlockable: Monorail Conductor Hat + Fast Travel Pass

suites.name: Royal Penthouse Suite
interactions: Play the grand piano with rhythm mini-game
Sip champagne in private infinity pool
Order room service from holographic butler
Access private rooftop with telescope
Host parties for up to 20 guild members

suites.name: Submarine Suite
interactions: Watch whale sharks pass by from bed
Adjust glass opacity from clear to frosted
Take underwater selfies through porthole
Discover secret hatch to maintenance tunnels
Feed fish through interactive feeding tube
suites.secretItem: Poseidon's Trident fragment behind aquarium panel

suites.name: Room 7777 — The Abyss Chamber
interactions: Float in zero-gravity mode
Touch the glass as deep-sea creatures pass
Activate the holographic star map navigation
Open the vault to discover ancient treasure
Witness the giant squid event (rare spawn)
suites.secretItem: The Abyss Key — unlocks final questline of the DLC

highlights.name: Sky Deck
highlights.feature: Nebula Sky Club, Helipad, Observation Lounge
